features.description: OpenRouter v2 — model selection based on anti-hallucination benchmark (BullshitBench v2, Software domain) + empirical latency+refusing tests. Haiku 4.5 for all high-volume analytical slots, Gemini Flash for speed-only tasks, DeepSeek V3 for code.

model_selection_rationale.anthropic/claude-haiku-4-5: BullshitBench v2 Software: 67-75% pushback. Empirical test: TTFT 0.9s, BS:1/4, Refused:0/4, Pushback:1/4. Best anti-hallucination/cost tradeoff. Used for all slots where honesty is critical (ANALYSIS, SKEPTICAL, REPORTING, DEFAULT).
model_selection_rationale.deepseek/deepseek-chat-v3-0324: Empirical test: TTFT 1.8s, BS:1/4, Refused:0/4. Good technical quality for code/payload generation. Does not refuse offensive security prompts.
model_selection_rationale.google/gemini-2.5-flash: Empirical test: TTFT 0.4s (fastest), Total 1.6s. BS:2/4 but used only for vision tasks and payload mutation where hallucination risk is lower. Do NOT use for analysis or skeptical review.
model_selection_rationale.REJECTED_qwen3-coder: BS:2/4, no pushback. Confirms false vulnerabilities too often.
model_selection_rationale.REJECTED_gemini-flash-lite: Refused:1/4 + BS:2/4 — worst of both worlds.
model_selection_rationale.REJECTED_kimi-k2: TTFT 1.6s, Total 8.5s, BS:2/4 — slow and hallucinates.

cost_per_scan_estimate.note: Estimated at 150 URLs. ANALYSIS_MODEL (high volume) is the main cost driver.
